summary: Fix all sprint-simulation review recommendations + 2 remaining zero-variance scorers (resolution, architecturalDrift)
context: Sprint-simulation smoke test showed +12.3 point Twining lift but review identified 5 issues: contextRecovery had biased ceiling (baseline capped at 50), cumulativeRework didn't discriminate, decisionConsistency was deflated for Twining by coordination files in diffs, bug-investigation resolution always 0 due to path mismatch, multi-session-build architecturalDrift always 100 due to checking only file preservation.
rationale: Each fix addresses a specific measurement bias: (1) narrowed contextRecovery ceiling to 100/80/70 from 100/70/50, (2) cubic rework curve + overlap penalty for discrimination, (3) excluded .twining files from pattern matching, (4) robust pathsMatch() for bug-investigation, (5) split architecturalDrift into file+pattern preservation. Sprint-simulation added to default --scenario all set as strongest coordination signal.
